revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:零羊崎神社]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: ありがとうございます
revision.text:
'''零羊崎神社'''（ひつじさきじんじゃ / れいようさきじんじゃ）は[[宮城県]][[石巻市]]に鎮座する[[神社]]。市内に2神社が鎮座するが、ともに『[[延喜式神名帳]]』の[[名神大社]]「'''零羊埼神社'''」の[[論社]]とされる。
*[[零羊崎神社 (石巻市真野)]] - 宮城県石巻市真野鎮座 *[[零羊崎神社 (石巻市湊)]] - 宮城県石巻市湊鎮座
{{曖昧さ回避}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: 個々の神社に読みと旧社格を追加し、五十音順に並び変え。
「一覧」を除去

getting rid of the stuff
Moving from [[Category:同名の神社]] to [[Category:shinto shrines with the same name]][[ja:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[category:kk]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:refresh]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
adding original pages to all pages in this category with replacement, because cat-a-lot is being way too slow
Adding [[Category:mass bump]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
translation removed it on some pages
fixing all links in Category:All disambiguation pages
Moving from [[Category:Original pages]] to [[Category:untranslated pages]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
'''Reiyosaki Shrine''' (零羊崎神社, pronounced *Hitsujisaki Jinja* or *Reiyosaki Jinja*) refers to two Shinto shrines located in {{ill|Ishinomaki|ja|石巻市}}, {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|ja|宮城県}}. Both are considered candidates for the {{ill|Myoujin Taisha|ja|名神大社}} listed as "Reiyosaki Shrine" in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}.
* {{ill|Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Minato)|ja|零羊崎神社 (石巻市湊)}} (*Hitsujisaki Jinja*) - Located in Minato, Ishinomaki City, Miyagi Prefecture. Formerly designated as a {{ill|Ken-sha|ja|県社}}. * {{ill|Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Mano)|ja|零羊崎神社 (石巻市真野)}} (*Reiyosaki Jinja*) - Located in Mano, Ishinomaki City, Miyagi Prefecture. Formerly designated as a {{ill|Son-sha|ja|村社}}.
== Related Articles == * {{Prefix}} * {{Intitle}}
{{Disambiguation}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]][[Category:untranslated pages]] <!--note do not remove this category during translation-->[[Category:untranslated pages]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[ja:零羊崎神社]]

'''Reiyosaki Shrine''' (零羊崎神社, pronounced *Hitsujisaki Jinja* or *Reiyosaki Jinja*) refers to two Shinto shrines located in {{ill|Ishinomaki|ja|石巻市}}, {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|ja|宮城県}}. Both are considered candidates for the {{ill|Myoujin Taisha|ja|名神大社}} listed as "Reiyosaki Shrine" in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}.
* {{ill|Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Minato)|ja|零羊崎神社 (石巻市湊)}} (*Hitsujisaki Jinja*) - Located in Minato, Ishinomaki City, Miyagi Prefecture. Formerly designated as a {{ill|Ken-sha|ja|県社}}. * {{ill|Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Mano)|ja|零羊崎神社 (石巻市真野)}} (*Reiyosaki Jinja*) - Located in Mano, Ishinomaki City, Miyagi Prefecture. Formerly designated as a {{ill|Son-sha|ja|村社}}.

'''Reiyosaki Shrine''' (零羊崎神社, pronounced *Hitsujisaki Jinja* or *Reiyosaki Jinja*) refers to two Shinto shrines located in {{ill|Ishinomaki|ja|石巻市}}, {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|ja|宮城県}}. Both are considered candidates for the {{ill|Myoujin Taisha|ja|名神大社|fr|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社}} listed as "Reiyosaki Shrine" in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyocho|ja|延喜式神名帳}}.
* {{ill|Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Minato)|ja|零羊崎神社 (石巻市湊)}} (*Hitsujisaki Jinja*) - Located in Minato, Ishinomaki City, Miyagi Prefecture. Formerly designated as a {{ill|Ken-sha|ja|県社}}. * {{ill|Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Mano)|ja|零羊崎神社 (石巻市真野)}} (*Reiyosaki Jinja*) - Located in Mano, Ishinomaki City, Miyagi Prefecture. Formerly designated as a {{ill|Son-sha|ja|村社}}.

revision.text:
'''Reiyosaki Shrine''' (零羊崎神社, pronounced *Hitsujisaki Jinja* or *Reiyosaki Jinja*) refers to two Shinto shrines located in [[:en:Ishinomaki|Ishinomaki]], [[:en:Miyagi Prefecture|Miyagi Prefecture]]. Both are considered candidates for the {{ill|Myoujin Taisha|ja|名神大社|fr|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myoujin Taisha|qq=|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} listed as "Reiyosaki Shrine" in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}.
* {{ill|Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Minato)|ja|零羊崎神社 (石巻市湊)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Minato)|qq=}} (*Hitsujisaki Jinja*) - Located in Minato, Ishinomaki City, Miyagi Prefecture. Formerly designated as a {{ill|Ken-sha|ja|県社|lt=Ken-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Metropolitan_and_Prefectural_Shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken-sha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}. * {{ill|Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Mano)|ja|零羊崎神社 (石巻市真野)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Mano)|qq=}} (*Reiyosaki Jinja*) - Located in Mano, Ishinomaki City, Miyagi Prefecture. Formerly designated as a {{ill|Son-sha|ja|村社|lt=Son-sha|1=Modern_system_of_ranked_Shinto_shrines#Village_shrines|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Son-sha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度}}.

Both are considered candidates for the {{ill|Myoujin Taisha|ja|名神大社|fr|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myoujin Taisha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Myōjin Taisha|WD=Q9610964}} listed as "Reiyosaki Shrine" in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}.
* {{ill|Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Minato)|ja|零羊崎神社 (石巻市湊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Minato)|1=HItsujisaki Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660144}} (*Hitsujisaki Jinja*) - Located in Minato, Ishinomaki City, Miyagi Prefecture. Formerly designated as a {{ill|Ken-sha|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Mano)|ja|零羊崎神社 (石巻市真野)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Mano)|1=Hitsujisaki Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660145}} (*Reiyosaki Jinja*) - Located in Mano, Ishinomaki City, Miyagi Prefecture. Formerly designated as a {{ill|Son-sha|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Son-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.

Both are considered candidates for the {{ill|Myoujin Taisha|ja|名神大社|fr|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myoujin Taisha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Myōjin Taisha|WD=Q9610964}} listed as "Reiyosaki Shrine" in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}.
* {{ill|Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Minato)|ja|零羊崎神社 (石巻市湊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Minato)|1=HItsujisaki Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660144}} (*Hitsujisaki Jinja*) - Located in Minato, Ishinomaki City, Miyagi Prefecture. Formerly designated as a {{ill|Ken-sha|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Mano)|ja|零羊崎神社 (石巻市真野)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Mano)|1=Hitsujisaki Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660145}} (*Reiyosaki Jinja*) - Located in Mano, Ishinomaki City, Miyagi Prefecture. Formerly designated as a {{ill|Son-sha|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Son-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.

Both are considered candidates for the {{ill|Myoujin Taisha|ja|名神大社|fr|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myoujin Taisha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Myōjin Taisha|WD=Q9610964}} listed as "Reiyosaki Shrine" in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}.
* {{ill|Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Minato)|ja|零羊崎神社 (石巻市湊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Minato)|1=HItsujisaki Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660144}} (*Hitsujisaki Jinja*) - Located in Minato, Ishinomaki City, Miyagi Prefecture. Formerly designated as a {{ill|Ken-sha|ja|県社|1=Prefectural Shrine|WD=Q90139226}}{{efn|Ken-sha|lt=Ken-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ken-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}. * {{ill|Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Mano)|ja|零羊崎神社 (石巻市真野)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Reiyosaki Shrine (Ishinomaki Mano)|1=Hitsujisaki Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11660145}} (*Reiyosaki Jinja*) - Located in Mano, Ishinomaki City, Miyagi Prefecture. Formerly designated as a {{ill|Son-sha|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|WD=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Son-sha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q712534}}.

Both are considered candidates for the {{ill|Myoujin Taisha|ja|名神大社|fr|Myōjin Taisha|zh|名神大社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myoujin Taisha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Myōjin Taisha|WD=Q9610964}} listed as "Reiyosaki Shrine" in the {{ill|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|ja|延喜式神名帳|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|13=User:Immanuelle/Engishiki Jinmyōchō|qq=}}.
